remarks: Professional office suite available for lease in the highly desirable Hayes House complex at 44 Strawberry Hill Ave. in the heart of Stamford. This well-maintained suite offers exceptional convenience with a private rear entrance directly from the parking area (no steps) along with abundant open parking for clients and visitors-ideal for professional office, medical, therapy, consulting, or administrative use. The functional layout features a welcoming waiting/reception area, two private offices, and a convenient half bath. Large windows provide excellent natural light throughout the suite, creating a bright and comfortable working environment. Built-in shelving and workspace areas add additional flexibility and storage options. Heat, hot water, and air conditioning are all included in the rent, offering excellent value and simplified monthly expenses. Clients and staff will appreciate the easy accessibility and central Stamford location just minutes from Downtown Stamford, Stamford Hospital, Metro-North train station, I-95, Merritt Parkway, restaurants, shopping, and major business centers. A rare opportunity to lease a conveniently located professional office suite with private access, abundant parking, and utilities included in one of Stamford's most established buildings.
